subject: Law firms that publish thought leadership close 2x more enterprise deals
body:
Hi [Name],

Most law firm marketing still relies on referrals and directories. The firms winning enterprise mandates in 2025 are doing something different: publishing specific, data-backed legal analysis their clients actually need.

According to Hinge Research, law firms with active thought leadership practices grow 4x faster than peers.

[Product] helps your team turn case work into publishable insights — without adding to anyone's workload. One client grew their inbound pipeline by 60% in one quarter.

Worth a quick conversation?
why_it_works: data-driven — research citation + competitor framing + no-extra-work promise
